scene_1.visual_plan: Start with a medium shot of the model looking directly into the camera, speaking naturally with soft handheld camera movement to create intimacy and engagement. The depth of field is shallow, focusing on the model’s face, with a cozy and softly lit indoor environment. After the first few words 'I regret not doing this sooner in lash care', cut to a close-up of the product in the model’s right hand, held gently near the face, showing clear branding and texture of the packaging, with steady tripod framing and a smooth slight rack focus from the model’s eye to the product. Return to the medium shot for the line 'Then I found ETERNAL EYELASH Premium, and honestly...', and as the model continues, cut again to a POV shot showing the model applying or holding the eyelash serum, emphasizing the product usage. End scene with the model holding the product visible in her right hand near her shoulder, camera slowly zooming out while the model finishes speaking, maintaining direct eye contact for connection.
scene_1.dialogue: I regret not doing this sooner in lash care because I used to struggle with weak. sensitive lashes that barely grew despite trying everything. Then I found ETERNAL EYELASH Premium. and honestly. it felt different from the start. my lashes became visibly fuller and more resilient without any irritation—even with my lash extensions. If you want better lashes that actually last. this is a game changer.
